basics.name: Hugh Xuechen Liu
basics.label: Postdoctoral Researcher
basics.summary: Interdisciplinary researcher at the intersection of artificial intelligence and humanistic inquiry. My current work develops computational frameworks that bridge game studies, generative AI, and creative practice, with emphasis on human-centred design, computational creativity, and user-centred evaluation.

work.name: Chalmers University of Technology
work.summary: Postdoctoral research in AI, game design knowledge, and computational creativity within the WASP-HS programme.

work.name: Perrett Laver Ltd (Hong Kong)
work.summary: Executive search firm specialising in education and research sectors. Conducted academic candidate research using bibliometric and online information tools; participated in MS Office 365 adoption task force.

work.name: City University of Hong Kong
work.summary: Postdoctoral research in game studies and human-computer interaction.

work.name: City University of Hong Kong
work.summary: Research assistance in the School of Creative Media.

work.name: New Media Institute, Institute of Advanced Technology, USTC
work.summary: Developed a MOOC on science filmmaking for the China Association of Children's Science Instructors; assisted in developing a digital science textbook and an AR picture book mobile app.
